name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: Houston, TX's First Cash Pawn at 1640 Gessner Rd offers fast cash through pawn loans and buy-sell-trade for jewelry and electronics.
description_long:
First Cash Pawn's location at 1640 Gessner Rd in Houston, TX stands as a convenient destination for residents seeking quick cash solutions. This standalone Houston pawn shop operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday 10 AM to 6 PM, with closed Sundays. The store welcomes both pawn customers and those browsing pre-owned merchandise for sale.

At this Houston location, the team handles pawn loans and buys items across jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, and collectibles. For inquiries about item values or quick loan options, call 713-454-7009. The straightforward process means fast approval and immediate cash when you need it.

If you're a Houston resident needing immediate funds, this pawn shop provides a reliable alternative to traditional loans. Bring a valid photo ID and the item you wish to pawn or sell, and the experienced staff handles the valuation and paperwork. First Cash Pawn builds its reputation on transparent valuations and fair terms.
pros: Over 3,300 locations providing accessibility across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, and Latin America
No credit check required for pawn loans, serving credit-constrained consumers
Buys diverse items including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Fast cash transactions with payment on the spot for items and gold
Layaway service available with affordable 10% down payment option
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) indicating financial stability and transparency
Additional revenue streams through AFF subsidiary's lease-to-own and retail finance network of 15,000+ merchants
cons: Risk of losing pledged personal property if pawn loans are not repaid on time
Pawn loans are short-term solutions and not suitable for long-term financial needs
Interest rates and terms for pawn loans not disclosed on website, requiring in-store inquiry
Limited transparency on specific loan amounts, terms, or percentage interest rates available online
Pawn transactions involve surrendering valuable personal items rather than traditional unsecured lending
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history needing immediate cash without credit checks
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they're willing to pledge temporarily for short-term cash needs
Individuals seeking quick cash transactions without lengthy application processes or approval timelines
Those interested in purchasing pre-owned merchandise at discounted prices through retail pawn inventory
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers with poor or no credit who need immediate liquidity and are willing to pledge valuable personal property as collateral. The critical caveat is that pawn loans involve losing possession of items if the loan isn't repaid—this is fundamentally different from traditional lending and should only be used for short-term cash emergencies, not ongoing financial needs.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property (non-recourse)
Retail sales of pre-owned jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Gold, silver, and platinum buying with immediate cash payment
Layaway services with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through AFF subsidiary
Online store locator to find nearest of 3,300+ locations
Online inventory browsing of available merchandise
Cash-on-the-spot transactions for merchandise and precious metals
Multi-country operations offering service in U.S., Latin America, and United Kingdom
meta_description: Houston, TX - First Cash Pawn at 1640 Gessner Rd. Fast pawn loans and quick cash.
